caption: A woman with short grey hair, wearing a red top under a dark navy blazer, is seated at a table against a plain white background. She sits behind a thin microphone and a clear plastic water bottle. The logo "mediasite" is visible in the top left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing slightly with her hands, which are clasped in front of her on the table. Her facial expression shifts from a neutral, focused gaze in the beginning to a slight smile as she looks toward someone off-camera. The camera remains stationary, capturing her from the waist up in a medium shot, with only her subtle head movements and changing facial expressions marking the progression of time.
